description.ko: 극한의 압력을 견디며 생물 발광이 빛나는 미드나잇 존의 깊은 바닷속을 항해하도록 설계된 특수 심해 탐사 유닛입니다.
description.en: A specialized deep-sea exploration unit designed to withstand extreme pressure while navigating the bioluminescent depths of the midnight zone.

prompt: A high-tech futuristic submersible robot named AQUA-5, sleek metallic blue and silver carbon fiber plating, glowing cyan bioluminescent LED accents, navigating a dark oceanic abyss, giant glowing translucent jellyfish and hydrothermal vents in the background, floating micro-particles, cinematic underwater lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, volumetric light rays.
